tool.name: PDA
tool.title: Smartphone
tool.text:
You've acquired a smartphone Check out these great features:
  • Messages - Instant communications!
  • Clues - Records every clue you find.
  • Evidence - Records all the evidence you find by locations.

tool.name: FireSceneToolKit
tool.title: Fire Scene Toolkit
tool.text: You’ve acquired a fire scene tool kit It contains a chisel, tweezers, and fire scene evidence containers. To use this tool kit, click it and then click an object at the crime scene.

tool.name: Camera
tool.title: Camera
tool.text: You’ve acquired a camera The camera is useful for documenting a fire scene and for taking pictures of burn patterns. To use this camera, click it and then click an object at the crime scene.
